name: Meta Ads
description: Programmatic access to Meta (Facebook & Instagram) advertising objects and management (ads, campaigns, creatives, insights, audiences).

auth_methods.note: Meta uses OAuth 2.0 flows to obtain user access tokens; apps have App ID and App Secret; supports various access tokens (user, page, app, system user). 'token' denotes access tokens; 'api_key' here maps to App ID/App Secret used for app identification; 'other' covers client tokens and system-user tokens.

credential_access.note: Developers can create a Meta App in App Dashboard and generate App ID/App Secret, obtain access tokens or create System Users without requiring sales or partner approval. Production advanced permissions require App Review and possibly Business Verification, but basic access/keys are self-serve.

api_surface.note: Marketing API is built on the Graph API (REST-style endpoints) and official SDKs exist (JS, PHP, Python). The docs list broad coverage of ads, campaigns, creatives, insights, audiences, etc.

buildability.note: With a self-serve app and generated access tokens or system-user tokens, developers can build against the Marketing API today. Some advanced permissions/features require App Review and Business Verification which may block production use for certain use-cases.

queries: Get started with Marketing API App ID App Secret access token system user
Marketing API access levels advanced access app review business verification
Meta App Dashboard create app get App ID App Secret
